---
title: "Impacto de la IA en los estudiantes"
output:
author:
  - Luis-Felipe Guajardo Torres
  - Pablo Morales Carvallo
  - rancisco Bahamondes Castro
  - Gabriel Lafertte Cárcamo
  - Diego Meléndez Córdova
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(visdat)
library(dlookr)
library(flextable)
library(skimr)
library(qqplotr)
library(ggpmisc)
library(VIM)
library(mice)
library(gridExtra)
```
